ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file containing the module */,
  "directory" TEXT /* Directory where the module is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module and its purpose */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the module was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the module */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the module was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the module (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module where the function is defined */,
  "func_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the function */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters accepted by the function */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Documentation or description of the function */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the function was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the function */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the function was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module where the variable is declared */,
  "var_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "var_type" TEXT /* Type of the variable */,
  "declaration" TEXT /* Declaration line of the variable */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the variable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variable was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the variable */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variable was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module that has the dependency */,
  "depends_on_module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module that is depended upon */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., compile-time, runtime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_depends_on_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("depends_on_module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the module */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Specific action performed by the user (e.g., updated function, added comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the module */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog detailing changes in the version */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who released the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated module */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the documentation file */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., API, user manual) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the documentation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the documentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module associated with the integration */,
  "project_tool" TEXT /* Name of the project management tool */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL of the integration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the integration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_integrations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_integrations_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)
